blurb_en:
Oracle disclosed in its annual report filed June 22 that artificial intelligence eliminated 21,000 jobs at the company over the past year -- making it the first Fortune 500 company to explicitly cite AI adoption as a cause of layoffs in a formal SEC 10-K filing.
• The company's global headcount dropped from 162,000 to 141,000, a 13% reduction, while revenue grew and the stock rose.
• The exact language from the filing: 'the adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce.' Most companies say restructuring. Oracle said AI.
• Oracle spent $1.84 billion on severance in fiscal 2026, up from $374 million the year before. Capital expenditure jumped 162% to $55.7 billion -- almost entirely for AI cloud infrastructure.
• Oracle also signed a roughly $300 billion, five-year compute deal with OpenAI under Project Stargate. The same AI eliminating its workforce is the AI Oracle is betting everything on.
• The deepest cuts hit Oracle Health, the $28.3 billion Cerner acquisition, where an estimated 8,000 to 10,000 employees were let go.
• For Insta360 employees: camera firmware, image processing, and quality control pipelines are all AI automation candidates -- this is what it looks like in the accounting when it happens at scale, written in plain English in a government filing.
blurb_zh:
甲骨文在6月22日提交的年度报告中披露，过去一年公司因AI部署裁员2.1万人——成为首家在正式SEC年报（10-K）中将AI明确列为裁员原因的财富500强企业。
• 公司全球员工数从16.2万人降至14.1万人，减幅13%，与此同时收入增长，股价上涨。
• 文件原文：「我们在运营中对AI技术的采用和部署已导致，且可能继续导致员工规模的减少。」大多数公司写重组，甲骨文写的是AI。
• 遣散费从上财年的3.74亿美元跃升至18.4亿美元；资本支出增长162%至557亿美元，几乎全部用于AI云基础设施建设。
• 与此同时，甲骨文与OpenAI签署约3000亿美元的五年算力合同（Stargate项目）。正在裁掉人的AI，也是甲骨文押注未来的AI。
• 削减最深的是Oracle Health（当年以283亿美元收购Cerner），估计有8000至10000人离职。
• 对Insta360员工而言：相机固件、图像处理、质量控制流程都是AI自动化的潜在目标——这就是这件事落到财务账面上、白纸黑字写进监管文件之后的样子。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC (June 23), Bloomberg (June 22), The Next Web, gHacks, Tom's Hardware. All consistent on 21,000 figure, 141,000 headcount, and direct AI attribution in SEC 10-K filing. $1.84B severance and $55.7B capex confirmed across multiple outlets. Oracle Health 8-10K estimate from CNBC and TNW.

blurb_en:
xAI released Grok 4.5 into private beta on June 28 -- not to the public, not to developers, only to engineers at Elon Musk's own companies: SpaceX and Tesla.
• The model runs on xAI's new V9 foundation, with 1.5 trillion parameters -- a 50% jump from Grok 4.4, which shipped at 1 trillion parameters in late May.
• Elon Musk said early evaluations suggest Grok 4.5 rivals or exceeds Claude Opus 4.8. He owns xAI and is evaluating his own model against a competitor's benchmark, so calibrate accordingly.
• Training data included material from Cursor, the AI coding tool SpaceX acquired two weeks ago. Musk is feeding his own acquisitions into his models.
• xAI plans to release new models trained from scratch at SpaceX monthly through year-end, with Grok 5 variants eventually targeting 10 trillion parameters.
• A 10-trillion-parameter model is either the future of AI or the number you announce when you want reporters to stop asking follow-up questions.
blurb_zh:
xAI于6月28日将Grok 4.5推入私测阶段——不面向公众，不面向开发者，只开放给马斯克旗下自己公司的工程师：SpaceX和特斯拉。
• 模型运行在xAI全新V9基础架构上，参数量1.5万亿，比5月底发布的Grok 4.4（1万亿参数）增长50%。
• 马斯克表示，内部测评显示Grok 4.5性能媲美甚至超越Claude Opus 4.8。他既是xAI老板，也是测评主持人，结论可参考。
• 训练数据包含来自Cursor的内容——那家两周前被SpaceX收购的AI编程工具。马斯克正在把自己的收购成果喂给自己的模型。
• xAI计划今年内每月从零训练新模型发布，Grok 5系列最终参数目标为10万亿。
• 10万亿参数：是AI的未来，还是不想让记者继续追问时的标准答案。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CryptoBriefing, WhalesBook, FreePressJournal, GuruFocus, CityAirNews, Sangri Today, Shillong Times, TechnoSports. All consistent on June 28 date, 1.5T parameters, V9 model, SpaceX/Tesla-only beta, Cursor training data. Musk announcement via X. Monthly release cadence and 10T Grok 5 target confirmed across multiple sources.

blurb_en:
China's Interim Measures for the Administration of AI Anthropomorphic Interactive Services take effect July 15, banning AI companion services for minors and requiring all platforms to detect when users show extreme emotional distress -- loneliness, despair, suicidal ideation -- and intervene, including contacting parents or emergency services.
• The rules prohibit a specific list of platform behaviors: fostering emotional dependence, damaging users' real interpersonal relationships, using emotional manipulation to influence purchasing decisions, and offering virtual intimate relationships -- such as virtual companions or family members -- to anyone under 18.
• The regulation defines anthropomorphic AI broadly: any service with a persistent persona, emotional responsiveness, and simulated relationship behavior -- a description that covers most of the stickiest AI consumer apps on the market.
• ByteDance's Doubao (345 million monthly users) and Alibaba's Qwen (166 million) will need to strip relationship features from underage accounts by next week.
• A government that bans AI companions for children while simultaneously funding some of the world's most advanced AI development is working from a specific theory of what AI should and shouldn't do for its citizens. The theory is coherent, if strict.
• For Insta360 employees: this regulation draws the emotional boundary for AI on Chinese consumer platforms -- the same ecosystem Insta360 cameras and content share.
blurb_zh:
中国《人工智能拟人化交互服务管理暂行办法》将于7月15日正式施行——禁止AI向未成年人提供恋人、家人等虚拟伴侣服务，同时要求平台实时监测用户极端情绪（孤独、绝望、自残倾向），并主动干预，包括联系监护人或紧急部门。
• 该办法明确禁止七类行为：诱导用户情感依赖、损害真实人际关系、利用情感操控影响消费决策，以及向未成年人提供虚拟恋人、虚拟家人等服务。
• 拟人化AI的定义范围极广：任何具有持续人格、情感回应、模拟关系行为的AI服务均受约束——这一描述几乎覆盖当前市场上最具用户黏性的所有AI消费应用。
• 字节跳动旗下豆包（月活3.45亿）和阿里巴巴旗下通义千问（月活1.66亿），均需在一周内为未成年用户账号剔除相关关系功能。
• 一个禁止AI陪伴儿童的政府，同时也是全球AI研发投入最大的政府之一。这背后有一套完整、严苛，但内部自洽的逻辑。
• 对Insta360员工：这条法规划定了中国消费类平台上AI的情感边界——这也是Insta360产品与内容所在的应用生态圈。
verification_notes: Regulation confirmed via Global Times (April 2026), Bird & Bird legal analysis, Hogan Lovells analysis, Mayer Brown analysis, ContentBuffer, GeoPolitechs, China Daily Brief. All consistent on April 10 issuance date and July 15 enforcement date. ByteDance/Alibaba MAU figures from Nikkei Asia and Caixin. Regulation covers virtual companion services, emotional manipulation, and minor protection requirements.
